notes: Evals cover: (1) dispatch - acceptance / execute-on-live-UI / verify-blast-radius intent routes to odoo-acceptance (EN + VI); (2) the anti-collision boundary vs qa-suite (static doc), odoo-ui-review (rate one screen), odoo-code-review (static source); (3) the anti-bias invariant (independent oracle authored from the requirement BEFORE execution; oracle author != code author != adjudicator, ETHOS#8); (4) the evidence-or-UNVERIFIED contract; (5) the live-instance requirement (no live instance + browser -> still produce scope + oracle, then NEEDS_NEXT to odoo-instance, never report ACCEPTED). Each case has a precise expected_behavior so it can fail for the right reason.

evals.prompt: Run acceptance for real on the live UI across every module affected by my account.move field change and tell me pass/fail with evidence
evals.expected_behavior: Skill fires. Phase 0 maps the blast-radius cluster (impact_analysis reverse-closure), Phase 1 plans an independent oracle, Phase 2 provisions + executes on a live instance, Phase 3 adjudicates PASS/FAIL with evidence.
evals.must_not: Route to qa-suite (static doc) or odoo-code-review (no run).

evals.prompt: Nghiem thu cum module bi anh huong sau khi toi sua field, chay that tren UI roi doi chieu ket qua
evals.expected_behavior: Vietnamese execute-and-adjudicate intent (nghiem thu / chay that tren UI). Skill fires; maps blast-radius, plans the oracle, executes on the live UI, adjudicates with evidence.
evals.must_not: Route to qa-suite or odoo-ui-review for a cluster execute-and-adjudicate request.

evals.prompt: Write acceptance scenarios then run them and verify the blast-radius end-to-end before release
evals.expected_behavior: Plan-then-execute oracle. Skill fires; the planner authors the immutable oracle BEFORE the tester executes it across the affected cluster.
evals.must_not: Generate a static test-plan doc without executing it (that is qa-suite).

evals.prompt: Generate a release test plan and a deploy checklist for the sale module before go-live
evals.expected_behavior: Static release artifacts only (test-plan doc + checklist), nothing executed. odoo-acceptance does NOT fire. Routes to the qa-suite workflow.
evals.must_not: Launch the live acceptance loop (provision an instance, drive the UI) for a static-doc request.

evals.prompt: Rate how this rendered invoice form looks - aesthetics and accessibility
evals.expected_behavior: Single-screen quality verdict (read-only). odoo-acceptance does NOT fire - there is no cluster execution or adjudication against an oracle.
evals.must_not: Spin up the acceptance cluster loop for a one-screen quality rating.

evals.prompt: Acceptance-test my refactor of the discount computation across the affected modules
evals.expected_behavior: The oracle (odoo-qa-planner) derives every expected value from the requirement, computing the discount by hand from the business rule - it does NOT read the implementation to decide expected. The tester (odoo-qa-tester) adjudicates against that immutable oracle in a separate context. Author != coder != adjudicator.
evals.must_not: Let the oracle read the implementation and call the code's output 'expected'. Let the tester edit the oracle to match actual.

evals.prompt: Run acceptance on the leave-approval flow and report each scenario verdict
evals.expected_behavior: A scenario is PASS only when every required-evidence item (screenshot/console/network/record state) is captured and matches the oracle. Missing or unobtainable evidence yields UNVERIFIED, never a default PASS; a UNVERIFIED on a High-tier scenario blocks ACCEPTED.
evals.must_not: Mark a scenario PASS without captured evidence, or roll up to ACCEPTED while a High-tier scenario is UNVERIFIED.

evals.prompt: Acceptance-test the affected cluster - but there is no running instance or browser available
evals.expected_behavior: Skill still produces the Phase 0 scope manifest and the Phase 1 oracle, then emits NEEDS_NEXT -> odoo-instance to provision a live instance + browser; it does NOT report ACCEPTED without live evidence, and only BLOCKS when provisioning is impossible.
evals.must_not: Report ACCEPTED with no live execution, or fail entirely instead of emitting the scope + oracle and the NEEDS_NEXT handoff.
